title: South Dakota Association of Disability Examiners (SoDADE, Inc.) — Bylaws
description: Corporate bylaws of SoDADE, Inc. (South Dakota Association of Disability Examiners), a South Dakota nonprofit corporation and chapter of NADE, with principal office in Sioux Falls (Minnehaha County). Articles cover offices/registered agent, relationship to NADE, members (Professional and Associate classes; meetings, notice, quorum, proxies, voting), officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary, Treasurer), board of directors, indemnification of directors and officers, contracts/loans/checks/deposits, transactions with the corporation, a September 1 to August 31 fiscal year, corporate seal, waiver of notice, and amendments. Includes a certification that the bylaws were adopted and filed March 3, 2005.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — South Dakota (SoDADE, Inc.) Chapter
source.title: Bylaws of SoDADE, Inc. (South Dakota Association of Disability Examiners)

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document S-Dakota-Const-Bylaws.doc. The bylaws certification states they were adopted at the initial board meeting and filed on 3 March 2005 (Sioux Falls), captured as temporal_coverage. Although the filename says 'const-bylaws', the document body is corporate Bylaws of the incorporated chapter (no separate constitution section). Many heading typos from the conversion ('ASSOCAIATION', 'ARTILCE', 'SETION', 'INDEMNIFICAION'). Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
